raw_response: I agree with the conclusion that communication (option D) serves as the cornerstone of behavior management. Effective communication not only sets up clear expectations but also builds trust between caregivers and patients, which is crucial for successful interventions such as those based on modeling or contingency management. Disagreeing would overlook how central understanding and clarity are to any therapeutic interaction. Therefore, my answer remains **D**.
